title: WORKSHOP ON VIRTUAL LABS 28-29 APRIL, 2017 - JUIT
content: Workshop on Virtual Labs: 28-29 April, 2017 Report about the Workshop on Virtual Labs during 28 th – 29 th April, 2017 at Jaypee University of Information Technology, Waknaghat173234. a. The workshop was opened by our Hon’able Vice Chancellor, Professor Vinod Kumar, Jaypee University of Information Technology, Waknaghat by his valuable words. b. The Workshop was organized in four sessions c. All four sessions were organized by the expert team from IIT, Delhi (Mr. Sajeev Soni; +91 8588817748, Mr. Ashish Ranjan; +91 9643358536 and Mr. Pratek Sharma; +91 987326626).
